author_identification.canonical_name_ar: عبد الرحمن بن سعيد بن علي بن وهف القحطاني
author_identification.scholarly_standing: Student and author of a biographical work on al-Hajjaj ibn Yusuf

scholarly_context.historical_significance: A biographical study of al-Hajjaj ibn Yusuf, a controversial figure in Islamic history
scholarly_context.muhaqiq_reputation: The editor, Dr. Saeed bin Ali bin Wahf al-Qahtani, is the author's father and a respected scholar
scholarly_context.tahqiq_methodology_note: The editor compared the text with the original manuscript and added a brief biography of the author
